name: Modern Business Proposal
tagline: Grey modern proposal deck with wide techno headings, red emphasis words, monospaced body copy, slash marks, and dramatic device/photo blocks.

palette.description: cool grey canvas with black wide display type, deep red emphasis, monospaced notes, and dark editorial image blocks

typography.style: wide futuristic display type with compact monospaced proposal copy

best_for: Modern business proposals, brand-forward client pitches, productized service offers, and project plans that should feel sharp and current.
avoid_for: Conservative board reporting, warm nonprofit storytelling, or soft HR decks where the techno proposal attitude would be too hard-edged.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Modern Business Proposal
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview sequence. It matches the grey canvas, wide black/red typography, mono body copy, slash marks, and photo/device composition vocabulary without reusing source images.
